IncidentDef.label: Marked Men raid
IncidentDef.letterText: A coordinated warband of Marked Men is moving on the colony. They are armed, mobile, and actively searching for weak points, power systems, food stores, wounded survivors, and exposed doctors. Expect immediate pressure from the map edge; they will not kidnap, steal, time out, or retreat.

IncidentDef.label: Marked Men probe
IncidentDef.letterText: A small Marked Men scouting pack has found the colony. This is not the main warband, but they are testing the perimeter, looking for wounded survivors, exposed doctors, open doors, and weak firing angles. Expect a fast edge assault with a small number of infected.

IncidentDef.label: Marked downed survivor
IncidentDef.letterText: A critically infected survivor has collapsed near the colony. They are carrying the Marked Virus and may turn at any moment. Rescue them or put them down before they become a threat.

IncidentDef.label: Marked Men caravan ambush
IncidentDef.letterText: A pack of Marked Men has ambushed the caravan! The infected erupt from cover with unnatural speed, cutting off escape routes. Fight through them or fall back to reform - but the Marked do not retreat, and every exchange of blood risks exposure to the Marked Virus.

IncidentDef.label: Marked Men horde
IncidentDef.letterText: A moving horde of Marked Men has found the colony. They are infected, armed, and coordinated enough to test weak points in the perimeter. Expect immediate pressure from the map edge; keep wounded pawns away from melee contact and seal fallback doors.
